title: Fix Inline foreach constraints on dynamic arrays of class objects (#7030)
body:
Fix #7030 

Description:

- Added support for inline foreach constraints on dynamic arrays (rand T items[]) and queues (rand T items[$]) of class objects in randomize() with {} blocks
- Modified V3Randomize.cpp to handle VlClassRef element types when iterating over container members in constraint expressions
- Added record_arr_table overload for VlClassRef in verilated_random.h
- Added test: t_constraint_foreach_classref
